assumptions: The question is assessed at the level of consolidated financial statements.
The dividend gives rise to an intragroup foreign-currency-denominated balance once the receivable is recognised.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies a recognised asset or liability as a hedged item family, which is the relevant top-level hedge model once a dividend receivable has been recognised.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 separately identifies forecast transactions as a distinct hedged item family, making cash flow hedge a peer top-level hedge model relevant to intragroup foreign exchange exposures more broadly.
